label: Who We Are
heading: Built by a support worker who was tired of broken promises.
paragraphs: Caring Is Our Calling was founded by someone who has worked inside the NDIS system — who has seen what happens when agencies grow too fast, stretch their teams too thin, and forget that every client is a person, not a number.
We exist to do things differently. By design, we will never have more than 8 clients at any one time. This isn't a compromise — it's the whole point.

That small number means every client gets a dedicated, consistent support team. The same familiar faces, week in and week out. No roster churn. No ghost workers. Just real, relationship-based support.

stats.label: Maximum Clients
stats.desc: By design, not by accident. Small by choice so we can be great at what we do.

stats.label: Dedicated Team
stats.desc: The same qualified workers, every visit. Consistency is the foundation of trust.

stats.label: Registered Provider
stats.desc: Fully registered and compliant with all NDIS Commission requirements.
